parties.name: CHAN, MICHELLE LISA 3 CHICAGO WAY SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Aug-26-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name. Judge: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Mary Hinds; Bailiff: Louise Pierotti. Petitioner is sworn and examined. Father of the minor is not present and has not been served. Court order the matter off calendar due to lack of proof of service on father. Minor's name should read Annalisa Michelle Chin and not Michelle Lisa Chan as appeared on calendar.
